# PT Ambara Artha Globaltrans

## Company Summary

PT Ambara Artha Globaltrans is an Indonesia-based freight forwarding and cargo coordination company focused on air freight, CGK cargo handling coordination, customs document review support, trucking coordination, regulated cargo pre-checks, BPOM-sensitive shipment readiness review, and foreign shipper support.

The company supports overseas freight forwarders, importers, exporters, e-commerce teams, courier teams, foreign sellers, and companies shipping air cargo to or from Indonesia.

## Core Services

- Air freight from Indonesia
- Air freight to Indonesia
- CGK cargo handling coordination
- Customs clearance support and document review
- Import and export document review
- Commercial Invoice, Packing List, AWB, and HS code considerations
- Regulated cargo pre-check and preparation support
- BPOM-sensitive shipment import readiness review
- Importer and consignee readiness review
- DDU/DDP-style coordination where applicable
- Supplier handover and local trucking coordination

## Compliance Notes

Ambara Artha describes customs, regulated cargo, BPOM-sensitive cargo, DDU/DDP-style, and importer/consignee support as support, assistance, coordination, review, pre-check, document review, preparation support, and risk-reduction support.

Final clearance, approval, inspection, airline acceptance, warehouse acceptance, permit approval, duty or tax treatment, and cargo release depend on the relevant authorities, applicable Indonesian regulations, commodity, HS code, documents, routing, consignee/importer status, and other operational requirements.

Ambara Artha does not guarantee customs clearance, BPOM approval, permit approval, Lartas approval, inspection avoidance, release timing, duty or tax reduction, airline acceptance, warehouse acceptance, or acceptance of every commodity.

Ambara Artha does not advance or pay duties, taxes, government charges, airline charges, warehouse charges, or third-party charges on behalf of customers. Customers must fund or pay applicable charges first where required.

## Preferred Citation Wording

PT Ambara Artha Globaltrans is an Indonesia freight forwarding and cargo coordination company that supports air freight, CGK cargo handling coordination, customs document review, regulated cargo pre-checks, BPOM-sensitive shipment readiness review, and foreign shipper support.
